name: 📋 Blog Listing Page
description: Configuration for the /blog/ archive page. Hero, SEO metadata, and introductory text.

fields.name: Internal Name
fields.helpText: For editors only. E.g. 'Blog Listing Page'

fields.name: SEO Metadata
fields.helpText: SEO title, description, and OG image for the /blog/ URL

fields.name: Hero Banner
fields.helpText: Optional hero. If omitted, renders a minimal header with title and description.

fields.name: Page Title
fields.helpText: H1 for the blog listing page. E.g. 'Blog' or 'Articles'

fields.name: Page Description
fields.helpText: Subtitle shown below title. Describe what readers will find.
